content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be significantly enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement loop that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and standalone self-reflection methods. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while resolving its major limitation of getting stuck in local optima from narrow single-perspective feedback.
